title: 皐月賞の後に・キラキラなんばーわん

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon finishes the Satsuki Sho with a
magnificent victory, securing the center spot in
the winning concert.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Faced with a packed venue of cheering fans, she
sees the world through the eyes of a top Umadol
for the first time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She wants to see the same sight after a dirt race
next. With her objective clearly decided...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon decides to advance on to one of the
few classic G1 dirt races—the Japan Dirt Derby.
